title: amphiglossa callunoides
intro: Amphiglossa callunoides, also known as the hairy lip or woolly lip, is a plant species in the family Compositae. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The leaves and roots of Amphiglossa callunoides can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits.
